name: combobox
description: A searchable select with a progressive-enhancement contract (ADR-0012): JS-OFF it IS a real native <select name=...> (token-styled like native-select) that submits in a plain POST form and is fully accessible with zero JS; JS-ON a CSP-clean typed-TS enhancer upgrades the SAME DOM in place into a WAI-ARIA combobox (a filterable text input over a listbox built from the same <option>s) while keeping the native <select> as the form-bound source of truth, so the field POSTs the same name whether or not JS ran. The form-native counterpart to the WIRE rich-select: this ships the small/preloaded catalog eagerly and filters CLIENT-SIDE (Filament Select/BelongsToField searchable+preload), where the wire one filters SERVER-SIDE per keystroke (lazy, needs a live connection, no JS-off render). Same options contract as native-select (List / optionGroups / content slot). `multiple` makes the native base a <select multiple> + renders removable chips JS-on. Plain HTML + Tailwind + --lv-* tokens; the only client bit is in-page filter + listbox keyboard nav, a typed-TS module the strict CSP accepts. Binds via l:model on the native <select>.
docs: Copies the combobox partial to your JTE root at lievit/combobox.jte (reached as @template.lievit.combobox(name=..., options=...)) and the CSP-clean enhancer to your alias root at lievit/combobox.enhancer.ts. Import the enhancer once from your entry module and call enhanceAllComboboxes() on load (and after any DOM swap). JS-OFF the native <select> POSTs the value under `name` in a plain form; JS-ON the same DOM upgrades to a searchable listbox that writes the chosen value(s) back to the native <select> (firing native input/change so l:model and forms both see it). Pass `options` (value==label), `optionGroups` (group label -> <optgroup>) or a `content` slot of hand-authored <option>/<optgroup> markup; set `multiple` for chips, `placeholder` / `searchPlaceholder` / `emptyText`, `size` (sm/md/lg toolbar parity), `disabled` / `required` / `invalid`, and `model` to bind. Requires the icon partial for the chevron. The source is yours: edit freely. For a lazy / server-filtered combobox over a huge catalog, use the wire rich-select component instead.
